2606.23441.title: Cross-Architectural Mixture-of-Experts with Adaptive Soft Routing for Plant Leaf Disease Classification
2606.23441.paper_summary: Plant leaf disease classification is crucial for crop protection and precision agriculture but remains challenging under complex backgrounds, illumination variations, and severe class imbalance. Moreover, single-architecture models often fail to effectively capture both local and global representations. To address these challenges, this study proposes an adaptive soft Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework with cross-architectural routing that integrates EfficientNet-B0, DenseNet-121, and Swin-Tiny to exploit complementary multi-scale, local, and global features. A soft gating mechanism dynamically assigns input-dependent expert weights, while a two-stage refinement training strategy improves optimization stability and generalization. Experiments on a highly imbalanced potato leaf disease dataset achieve 91.68% recall and 92.62% F1-score, surpassing the strongest individual expert by 5.91% and 5.03%, respectively. Additional evaluations on durian and sesame leaf disease datasets yield F1-scores of 94.03% and 97.04%, demonstrating robust cross-dataset generalization and the potential of the proposed framework for reliable real-world crop health monitoring
2606.23441.paper_summary_zh: 植物葉片疾病分類對於作物保護和精準農業至關重要，但在複雜背景、照明變化和嚴重類別不平衡的情況下仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>此外，單一架構模型往往無法有效捕捉局部和全局表徵。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，本研究提出了一種自適應軟混合專家（MoE）框架，具有跨架構路由，整合了EfficientNet-B0、DenseNet-121和Swin-Tiny，以利用互補的多尺度、局部和全局特徵。<lb/>一種軟閘控機制動態分配依賴於輸入的專家權重，而兩階段的精煉訓練策略則提高了優化的穩定性和泛化能力。<lb/>在一個高度不平衡的馬鈴薯葉片疾病數據集上進行的實驗達到了91.68%的召回率和92.62%的F1-score，分別超過了最強的單一專家5.91%和5.03%。<lb/>對榴槤和芝麻葉片疾病數據集的額外評估產生了94.03%和97.04%的F1-score，顯示出強大的跨數據集泛化能力以及所提出框架在可靠的現實世界作物健康監測中的潛力。
2606.23441.author: Phi-Hung Hoang et.al.
